Every Tom Brady TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Tom Brady has thrown 713 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Tom Brady has thrown 83 playoff TDs which is about 11.6 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Tom Brady has connected with Rob Gronkowski for 105 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 92 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Tom Brady has accumulated 11,867 yards. That's more passing yards than Rex Grossman (11,015) threw in his entire career.
